title: Log4Shell - Remote Code Execution
description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features used in configuration, log messages, and parameters do not protect against attacker controlled LDAP servers.

title: Spring4Shell - Remote Code Execution
description: A Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux application running on JDK 9+ may be vulnerable to remote code execution (RCE).

title: Jackson Databind Deserialization
description: FasterXML jackson-databind vulnerable to denial of service via deeply nested arrays.

title: OkHttp TLS Verification Bypass
description: OkHttp verifyHostname does not verify the hostname in some conditions.

title: Gson Deserialization
description: Gson deserialization vulnerability could lead to RCE.

title: Apache Commons Text4Shell
description: Apache Commons Text performs variable interpolation allowing RCE.
